description_long: This is a pair of modern sunglasses with a bold, angular frame and full-rim design. The frame is thick and robust, featuring a matte black finish that gives it a contemporary, urban appeal. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing strong sun protection and a sleek, mysterious look. The temples are straight and slightly tapered, with a subtle curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. On the front right lens and the left temple, there is a visible white brand logo, adding a touch of distinction. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, contributing to the overall sturdy construction.
description: A pair of matte black, full-rim sunglasses with dark lenses and a bold, angular frame. Features a visible white brand logo on the lens and temple.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-rim, angular frame, dark lenses, and prominent white brand logo on the right lens.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight, thick temple and the frame's robust profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame and temples, with the brand logo visible in reverse on the lens.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the temple's shape and the frame's thickness, with the logo visible on the inside of the lens.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has a bold, angular, and geometric shape with a full-rim construction. It is thick and robust, with straight temples that curve slightly at the ends. The overall style is modern and sporty, with no ornate embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark-tinted, nearly opaque, with a uniform coloration that appears black or very dark gray. There is no visible gradient, mirroring, or special effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a solid, integrated type, forming a continuous part of the frame with a slight dip in the center. It is wide and flat, providing structural support.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, thick, and unadorned except for a white printed brand logo on the left temple. The ends are slightly curved for comfort, with no additional patterns or engravings.
attribute_brand_logo: A white printed brand logo is visible on the front right lens and the left temple.
